text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hell yeah, crushed my time! Time for another lap!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you think this is enough to take me out? I'll
crush my record again, just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
See, I'm gonna need a whole lot of trainin' if I
wanna take down all of my rivals.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But, man, havin' a trustworthy partner really helps
things along. Ain't that right, Teach?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
With you around, I can train my heart out without
worryin' about anything.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't have much in the brains department, but
I've got you to make up for that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, back to business! I've gotta get used to
how that run felt just now.
